home.heroSubtitle: Designer. Photographer. Filmmaker. Audio Engineer. Crafting powerful brands and immersive experiences.
home.addFromAdmin: Add some from the admin panel
home.servicesDesc: Combining strategy, cinematic design, and cutting-edge technology to create digital experiences that elevate brands and captivate audiences.

about.title: Mohamed
about.intro: Multidisciplinary creator combining cinematic design, sound engineering and digital innovation to bring experiences to life that leave a lasting impression.
about.bio1: Based in Casablanca, I merge over 10 years of expertise in visual design, photography, video production, audio engineering and web development to create powerful narratives across every medium.
about.bio2: My approach is rooted in cinematic aesthetics — every project is treated like a scene: light sculpts the mood, sound amplifies emotion, and design guides the eye.
about.bio3: Today, I also integrate artificial intelligence and advanced prompting into my creative arsenal, pushing the boundaries between human craftsmanship and technological innovation.
about.quote: Every pixel has a role. Every frequency has an intention. Every frame tells a story. My work isn't just about creating —
about.expertise1Desc: Premium visual identities, UI/UX, luxury branding and art direction for brands that want to stand out.
about.expertise2Desc: Urban reportages, portraits and photographic series with cinema-inspired color grading.
about.expertise3Desc: Aftermovies, promotional films and cinematic content with dynamic editing and professional grading.
about.expertise3Tools: Premiere Pro · DaVinci Resolve · After Effects
about.expertise4Desc: Immersive sound design, music production, mixing and mastering for films, ads and interactive experiences.
about.expertise4Tools: Ableton Live · Pro Tools · Logic Pro
about.expertise5Desc: Modern web applications, high-end showcase sites and custom platforms with cutting-edge technologies.
about.expertise6Desc: Integration of artificial intelligence in creative workflows, automation and custom AI solutions.
about.timeline1Desc: First steps in graphic design and visual creation
about.timeline2Desc: Launch of first commercial freelance projects
about.timeline3Desc: Art direction for brands and creative agencies
about.timeline4Desc: Independent multidisciplinary studio, AI & web development
